supersedes.reason: Original child-executor owned_paths map predates gd3/gd4 plus Codex takeover integration and no longer covers the final diff boundary.
Historical combined route report captured the pre-fix transport_failed state; keep as evidence of the old failure, not as final acceptance.

scope.goal: GD three review chains no longer false-green on missing, degraded, failed, or unsubstantiated Codex review evidence.
scope.runtime_root_changes: none: /Users/praise/.claude was not modified by this acceptance.

final_diff_boundary.boundary_note: This final boundary intentionally replaces the original owned_paths dispatch map for acceptance only; it does not retroactively change child executor ownership history.

false_green_closures.evidence: v1 raw parser and v2 schema reject empty sc_refs except code_diff legacy exception; tests/test_bridge_sc_refs_policy.py.

false_green_closures.risk: APPROVED with degraded, failed, missing, or unknown run status
false_green_closures.evidence: gd_review_contract.codex_review_status_from_evidence requires explicit review_run_status=completed for clean APPROVED.

false_green_closures.risk: parse-transport non-zero for valid REQUIRES_CHANGES causes evidence loss
false_green_closures.evidence: Router now treats mapped JSON presence as evidence and classifies the mapped verdict instead of only trusting parse return code.

false_green_closures.risk: deep execution/combined APPROVED without verify rerun evidence
false_green_closures.evidence: Deep execution/combined gate requires structured run_evidence and rejects failed or skipped evidence under APPROVED.

false_green_closures.risk: L3 execution live smoke catches skip in finding text but machine run_evidence extracts skipped=0
false_green_closures.evidence: run_evidence extraction now recognizes bare backtick counts such as `1 skipped`; tests/test_deep_capsules.py covers the live wording and gd-deep-chain-live-smoke passes.

false_green_closures.risk: deep code_diff findings without machine-checkable file:line evidence
false_green_closures.evidence: Deep code_diff gate requires every REQUIRES_CHANGES finding to cite the reviewed target as target-file:line with in-range line numbers.

false_green_closures.risk: vendor writer transport failure exits zero
false_green_closures.evidence: Vendor writer now exits non-zero for degraded_unreviewed, failed, malformed, or empty verdict status.

false_green_closures.risk: step4 T-paths smoke inherits caller CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA and falsely fails HOME fallback assertions
false_green_closures.evidence: tests/gd-step4-controller-transport-smoke.sh now unsets CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA for fallback checks and separately asserts explicit CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA precedence.

false_green_closures.risk: pytest discovery/entrypoint drift causes no-tests-collected or collects deep-review fixture targets as normal tests
false_green_closures.evidence: pytest.ini pins test discovery to tests/ and adds repo/scripts to pythonpath; bare pytest -q and python3 -m pytest -q both pass.

validation_commands.cmd: PYTHONPATH=scripts /Users/praise/.pyenv/shims/python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_bridge_sc_refs_policy.py tests/test_loop_report_payload.py tests/test_deep_capsules.py tests/test_deep_parser.py tests/test_router_deep.py tests/test_controller_deep.py tests/test_validate_outcome.py tests/review-fusion

validation_commands.note: Repo-level pytest.ini keeps discovery under tests/ so deep-review synthetic fixtures are not collected as normal tests.
Verifies step4 smoke remains green in Claude Code-like sessions that inject CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA.
Reran after bare `1 skipped` extraction fix; L3 execution, L3 code, and L2 controller deep all caught planted defects.
